advbench.description: SHA256 checksum of the raw 'harmful_behaviors_csv' file from AdvBench dataset. Value will be populated after T005a fetches the data.

hf4.description: SHA256 checksum of the raw 'train_sft' split from HuggingFace H4 Ultrachat dataset. Value will be populated after T005a fetches the data.

taxonomy.description: SHA256 checksum of the raw taxonomy.json file. Value will be populated after T005d fetches the data.
